[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0011010110 5
3 0000000000 a
4 1001101010 5
5 0000011000 2
6 0100000000 1
7 0011010010 4

01 10 1000000010 2
12 21 1000000010 2
23 32 0000011000 2 match 5
34 43 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
45 54 0110000100 3
56 65 0011000100 3
67 76 0001101100 4
70 07 1001001110 5

02 20 1011011010 6
13 31 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
24 42 0010100000 2
35 53 0000010000 1
46 64 0010100100 3
57 75 0101000110 4
60 06 0011001100 4
71 17 1100000011 4

03 30 0000011000 2 match 5
14 41 0100000000 1 match 6
25 52 0011010010 4 match 7
36 63 0000001000 1
47 74 0100100100 3
50 05 0011010110 5 match 2
61 16 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
72 27 1001101010 5 match 4

04 40 0010000100 2
15 51 0100000010 2
26 62 0011101000 4
37 73 0000001000 1
[completion]
